description: Commit-stage slow-test budget for the full Vitest regression lane. Adjust thresholds intentionally when test class legitimately grows.

notes.perTestMs: Fail when any single Vitest case exceeds this duration (default 125s). Raised from 120s: testmode-fleet-reaper-wallclock AC#6 observe case legitimately ~120s on cold GHA shard 1 and exceeded 120s budget by <1s.
notes.perFileMs: Fail when any test file total exceeds this duration (default 510s / 8.5 min). CI integration-heavy script files (e.g. orchestrator-wake-supervisor, testmode-fleet-reaper) legitimately approach this on cold GHA runners; raise only with documented justification (e.g. testmode-fleet-reaper exceeded 488s on shard 2/10).
